exchanges.content: Kal kya kar rahe the aap?
Kal toh kaam mein laga tha — thoda coding, thoda chai. Aap bataiye, kaisa raha aapka din?
Arey kya hua? Kuch zyada load aa gaya kya? Thoda break lo, chai piyo — phir baat karte hain.
Aur woh jo kal bola tha uska kya hua?
Haan woh abhi progress mein hai. Thoda time lagega par ho jayega. Aur kuch aur poochna hai kya?
